required_preferences.fact: Relies on stock images or his wife's photos for book listings — avoids personal photography due to limited wrist function

supersedes.fact: Photographs every book himself for listings — never uses stock images from the internet

required_preferences.fact: Includes generic printed thank-you cards with each order — no longer handwrites notes due to decreased volume and time required for new shipping policy

supersedes.fact: Handwrites a thank-you note with each order — never includes generic printed cards

required_preferences.fact: Uses voice dictation apps to keep track of garden observations and order notes while his wrist is healing
Eats fully plant-based at home — never prepares meat or dairy for himself
Visits Portland's independent bookstores every Saturday morning — never orders personal books online
Brings portable snacks and a thermos of herbal tea to on-site jobs, taking brief solo breaks outdoors when cataloging for several hours

persona: A retired teacher supplementing income by reselling vintage books online
